title: Model settlement deeds
description: Model settlement deeds available to download in Microsoft Word.
keywords: settlement, settlement deed, full model deed, short model deed, GST model deed, short deed for ART cases, model deed

content_blocks.text: The model deeds listed below can be used as a basis for a deed of settlement

items: Full model deed (DOCX, 43.9 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a complex income tax dispute
Short model deed (DOCX, 37.0 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a less complex income tax dispute
GST model deed (DOC, 120 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a GST dispute
Short deed for ART cases (DOCX, 41.3 KB) This link will download a file – Used for an income tax dispute that is currently with the Administrative Review Tribunal

rows: Find out more Code of settlement Practical guide for the ATO Code of settlement

content_text:
The model deeds listed below can be used as a basis for a deed of settlement
- Full model deed (DOCX, 43.9 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a complex income tax dispute
- Short model deed (DOCX, 37.0 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a less complex income tax dispute
- GST model deed (DOC, 120 KB) This link will download a file – Used for a GST dispute
- Short deed for ART cases (DOCX, 41.3 KB) This link will download a file – Used for an income tax dispute that is currently with the Administrative Review Tribunal
Find out more Code of settlement Practical guide for the ATO Code of settlement
